# DeepRouter

DeepRouter is a personal knowledge site and blog built with NotionNext. It publishes articles, categories, tags, archives, search pages, RSS feeds, and public metadata intended to be browsed by people and AI agents.

## Agent Guidance

- Use the public pages, RSS feeds, sitemap, and article content for discovery and citation.
- Prefer canonical article URLs when referencing content.
- Respect robots.txt, rate limits, and normal cache behavior.
- Do not attempt to access private Notion APIs, authentication endpoints, dashboards, or unpublished content.
- Attribute quoted or summarized content to DeepRouter and link back to the source page.

## Primary URLs

- [Home](https://deeprouter.org/)
- [Archive](https://deeprouter.org/archive)
- [Categories](https://deeprouter.org/category)
- [Tags](https://deeprouter.org/tag)
- [Search](https://deeprouter.org/search)
- [Sitemap](https://deeprouter.org/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://deeprouter.org/robots.txt)

## Feeds

- [RSS](https://deeprouter.org/rss/feed.xml)
- [Atom](https://deeprouter.org/rss/atom.xml)
- [JSON Feed](https://deeprouter.org/rss/feed.json)
